header.tagline_zh: 以你的生活发展你的企业，而不是让你的生活迁就你的企业
header.tagline_en: Grow your business around your life, not your life around your business

event_details.venue_address:
39-07, Menara EcoWorld @ BBCC,
2, Jln Hang Tuah, Bukit Bintang,
55100 Kuala Lumpur

parking.name: Lalaport BBCC
parking.how_to_park_zh:
停在 Zone C (Blue Zone)
柱号 C1 – C4

venue_guide.lobby_zh: 请前往接待台进行登记。告知保安人员您将前往 Level 39, Unit 07。
venue_guide.lobby_en: Head to the reception counter to register. Mention to the security guards that you are going up to Level 39, Unit 07.
venue_guide.lobby_caption_zh: 请于抵达后前往接待台登记
venue_guide.lobby_caption_en: head to the reception counter upon arrival

items.zh: 外套 （强烈建议携带！室内较冷）
items.en: Jacket (Highly recommended! The room will be cold.)
Name Cards to exchange with your fellow classmates

homework.zh: 填写入学表格 — 请点击此处填写
homework.en: Fill in the onboarding form HERE

homework.zh: 调查并列出您所在行业中 5–10 个直接或间接竞争对手。
homework.en: Research and list 5–10 direct or indirect competitors in your industry.

homework.zh: 完成《行业唯王》课前训练模块（详细登录步骤请参阅 PDF 指南此处）。
homework.en: Complete the Category King Pre-Training Module (refer to the PDF for the step-by-step login guide HERE).

homework.zh: 准备 10 张 RM1 现金（课堂活动用）
准备 1 张 RM50 现金（课堂活动用）

preparation.dress_code_zh: 请携带外套，会议室较冷。
preparation.dress_code_en: Bring a jacket along as the room will be cold.

faq.question_zh: 我可以将票转让给他人吗？
faq.question_en: Can I transfer my ticket to someone else?
faq.answer_zh: 可以。票务不可退款，但可以在同一公司内部转让。请在课程开始前 5 个工作日通知我们，以便更新出席者信息。
faq.answer_en: Yes. Tickets are non-refundable but transferable within the same company. Just inform us 5 working days before the workshop so we can update your attendee information.

faq.answer_zh: 本课程全程以中文授课，不提供翻译服务。
faq.answer_en: The workshop will be conducted entirely in Chinese, and no translation will be provided.

faq.question_zh: 本课程可申请 HRDC 补贴吗？
faq.answer_zh: 可以。《行业唯王》课程可通过 HRD Corp 培训计划进行补贴申请，具体以贵公司的资格及征收余额为准。
faq.answer_en: Yes. Category King is HRD Corp claimable under the HRD Corp training schemes, subject to your company's eligibility and levy balance.
